comments.author: @l.d.agarwal3893
comments.text_raw: After many years Uttar Pradesh electorate expected to choose a national party BJP in place of casteist/religion based parties like SP, BSP, Congress now on fringe. In case BJP gets its own majority in this most important state of the country the clock would have turned full circle where BJP will formally replace Congress as the only national party. It will also lead to in future marginalisation of caste/religion/region based parties and country moving into a modern nation state.
